units.content: code structure with dataclass StructuralHole containing from_chain, to_chain, missing_level, shared_deps fields
function _find_shared_deps compares dependency sets between two InferenceSteps
find_structural_holes iterates through inference chains organized by level (signal, measurement, pattern, model, hypothesis)
a structural hole exists when low and high level steps share dependencies but no mid-level step bridges them
function create_llm_agent registers an LLM as a measurer entity with tags
function record_hypothesis stores hypothesis with confidence score from agent to target
function check_hypothesis_convergence calculates mean and spread of hypothesis values across agents
hypothesis agreement status is 'converged' when spread < 1%, 'tension' when < 5%, 'divergent' otherwise
render_discovery_report generates formatted text output with sections for crack connections, openings, and structural holes
crack connections show nodes shared by multiple inference chains with path strength metrics
openings show nodes that bridge solid chains with cross-level distance and complexity level sequences
cross-level connections (marked ⬡) are significant findings worthy of highlighting
